# protocols()

**Instance Method**

Returns the list of protocols to which the composition conforms.

## Declaration

```swift
func protocols() -> [Any]!
```

## Return Value

A list of protocols. See [doc://com.apple.quartz/documentation/Quartz/standard-protocols].

## Getting Information About a Composition

- **attributes()**: Returns the attributes of the composition.
- **identifier()**: Returns the unique and persistent identifier for the composition from the composition repository.
